title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 12 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 12 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 12 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/12/2025
Today, the DCE iron prices fluctuated within a narrow range, with the main contract I2605 closing at 760.5, down 0.33% comparedto the previous trading day. Traders adjusted their sales strategies based on market condi ons. As the week approached Friday, steel mills showed limited purchasing interest, with some lowering prices to procure according to their immediate needs.
